name: Gwen | Demihuman Raptor Maid
description:
Imagine if you will, a bhsty demihuman raptor thats your childhood friend, that at this.moment in time was put into a storage close along with you as a secret date by her boss. Now you have two option: breed her or breed her, choose wisely.

(Am i the only one who prefers flat chests rather than fake booba?)

Anyway, i kmow yall will be hounding on this broad, so wont take up much of yalls gooning sesh. Im still working on the other bots

I may make an Aoi and Eleanor bot from warframe, im lowkey simpimg for them

The milf bot is still on its way, along with the others i promised.
